name: tldps-battery
description: Internal sim test battery — orchestrates wrangler dev + sim_party.py bots + real-WS receiving client (Playwright). Phase 1: S1.1 runner scaffold + S1.2 receiving-client harness + S1.3 smoke scenarios.

scripts.check: node --check runner.js receiving-client.js scenarios/index.js scenarios/smoke-boot.js scenarios/lifecycle-basic.js scenarios/single-boss-board.js scenarios/drill-down-both-sides.js

notes.wrangler: Run from workers/party/ with wrangler dev — started automatically by runner.js
notes.phase-0: window.__tldps (Observability #3) is soft-checked; harness degrades gracefully if not present
notes.gate: npm run smoke is the hard gate before any release (all runtime:browser scenarios must PASS)
